name: anger-point
description_fr: Quand ce Pokémon reçoit un coup critique, son Attaque augmente au maximum de 6 niveaux.  Ce talent prendra toujours effet si le coup critique est reçu par un Clonage.
description_en: Whenever this Pokémon receives a critical hit, its Attack rises to the maximum of 6 stages.  This ability will still take effect if the critical hit is received by a Substitute.
